title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: HARNEY COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 420 N Fairview Avenue Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:00am-noon and 1pm-5pm Friday 8:30-noon 1-2:30pm Closed on holidays (541) 573-2271 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-2271 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on North Fairview directly across the street from Harney District Hospital Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HIGH COUNTRY HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER PRIMARY CARE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HARNEY COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
